summary: Recently Visited feature on Hub page - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Hub page loads with profile card and all 9 accordion sections, (2) Visit tracking works - 'Recently Visited' section appears after navigating to Hub items, (3) Max 4 items constraint works - 5th item pushes out oldest, (4) Deduplication works - clicking same item moves it to top without duplicating, (5) Recent chips are clickable and navigate to correct destinations, (6) AsyncStorage persistence works across tab navigation, (7) Accordion sections expand/collapse correctly, (8) Bottom tab bar (Home, Contacts, Activity, Inbox, Hub) all work.
critical_code_review_comments: more.tsx lines 78-107: RecentVisit type properly defined with title, icon, color, subtitle, timestamp fields
more.tsx lines 84-92: useFocusEffect correctly loads recent visits from AsyncStorage on Hub focus
more.tsx lines 94-107: trackVisit() function properly handles deduplication by filtering existing entries before prepending
more.tsx line 103: MAX_RECENT=4 constraint correctly applied with visits.slice(0, MAX_RECENT)
more.tsx lines 667-669: renderMenuItem correctly wraps onPress to call trackVisit before navigation
more.tsx lines 823-846: Recently Visited section properly renders as 2-column grid chips between profile card and accordion sections
more.tsx lines 827-843: Recent chip onPress correctly finds matching MenuItem from allSections and calls its onPress
AsyncStorage key 'hub_recent_{userId}' ensures per-user isolation of recently visited data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recently Visited feature fully working. Key implementation: (1) Visits stored in AsyncStorage with key 'hub_recent_{userId}', (2) trackVisit() called in renderMenuItem's onPress wrapper, (3) Recent items rendered as 2-column grid chips, (4) Clicking a recent item finds the matching MenuItem from allSections by title and calls its onPress. Note: Some Hub item destinations (like /card/{userId}, /campaigns/dashboard) don't show the tab bar — to get back to Hub, navigate directly to /more URL.

features_verified.recently_visited_deduplication: PASS - Clicking same item moves to top without creating duplicate
features_verified.recently_visited_chips_clickable: PASS - Clicking chip navigates to correct destination
features_verified.recently_visited_persistence: PASS - Section persists after tab navigation (AsyncStorage working)
